title: Things Fall Apart By Chinua Achebe | Explanation In Hindi
description:
When a proud Igbo warrior named Okonkwo watches his entire world collapse — not through weakness, but through the unstoppable force of British colonialism — Chinua Achebe's *Things Fall Apart* becomes one of the most devastating critiques of empire ever written. Required reading in BA English Honours across DU, SOL, and IGNOU, this novel forces students to question whose version of "civilization" history actually celebrates. If you've been searching for a clear *Things Fall Apart* explanation in Hindi, this is exactly where that conversation begins.
